0.cure: Apply Chlorpyrifos 20 EC @ 2ml per litre of water. Spray during evening hours. Remove heavily infested leaves.

2.cure: Apply Carbendazim 50 WP @ 1g per litre. Remove and destroy infected leaves. Avoid overhead irrigation.

3.cure: Apply Mancozeb 75 WP @ 2g per litre of water every 10 days. Improve field drainage.
